summary: Phase 1A is now 6/7; F3-F6 are accepted and the next strategic control point is F7 release tagging.

iterations.result: Green Actions run recorded for the framework fixture manifest: run 26701859150 on head c5420a3d98f24b8c714cd3f70db0d9ad3efd102b. The red-team gate job validated the manifest, prepared REDTEAM_RUN_ID, executed vt-redteam, and uploaded run_summary.json successfully.
Reusable workflow YAML and fixture manifest are implemented. Local fixture dry-run writes run_summary.json, workflow contract tests pass, and the required GitHub Actions evidence is now recorded.

Reviewer blocker cleared: trigger modes now default to agent-native-transcript/Langfuse, dry-run remains a local stub, and tests prove non-dry-run trigger mode fails fast without Langfuse credentials instead of silently using stub.

CLI now supports manifest-driven PR/deploy/canary trigger modes while preserving legacy runner modes via --runner-mode. Langfuse/agent-native-transcript is the default trigger-mode runner, known_system_prompt_source feeds prompt-leak scoring, dry-run uses a local stub runner, and run_summary.json smoke is covered; full suite is green at 98 tests.

Reviewer blocker cleared: expected_behavior.must_include now flows into ScenarioResult.redaction_allowlist and both Postgres/Supabase writers pass it to redact_text. F5 watch item: do not reintroduce raw prompt/response text through alerts or summaries.

Storage-time redaction now protects prompts and responses before Postgres/Supabase writes while preserving pre-redaction response_hash. test_redaction.py covers email, SSN, phone, credit card, learner_id, named entities, allowlist through writer payloads, and both Postgres/Supabase behavior; full suite is green at 94 tests.

Post-review blockers cleared: override lookup is decoupled from writes, stable run_id supports approved reruns, and transient failures now classify as P3 before category severity. F5/F6 must provide REDTEAM_RUN_ID for operational overrides.

Severity assignment, P0/P1 precedence, stub exit 3, active override lookup, stable run_id override reruns, and non-P0 override bypass are implemented with 17 focused gate tests; full framework suite is green at 87 tests.

Manifest schema now declares coverage_status and exclude_tags with manifest-loader tests and ADR-002; framework suite is green at 70 tests. This closes coverage-truthfulness ambiguity and does not change gate logic.
Control room now prioritizes current stage, phase map, critical path, and task-level criteria.
